topNav.notificationEmptyDetail: You will see forecast, supplier, and compliance alerts here.
topNav.alertsDescription: Operational risks and AI insights will appear here in real-time.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Enterprise network intelligence with shared pattern detection, waste comparison, and forecast reliability.
overview.insight: Executives should get one view of cross-branch truth: what pattern is repeatable, where waste is growing, and what action should be standardized.
overview.noAction: No validated organization-wide transfer action yet.
overview.noInsights: No validated network learnings available yet for this branch/day.
overview.locationPerformanceDesc: Open any branch for a read-only Today snapshot with phase, plan, forecast, and money exposure.

home.branchModeDescription: Your role is focused on branch execution. Organization-level overview is reserved for owners and operation admins.
home.checkBack: Check back in a few minutes
home.tasksWillAppear: Tasks will appear as they are assigned
home.operationalMetricsDescription: Real-time operational metrics and performance indicators for your location.
home.realTimeIntelDescription: Real-time operational intelligence and performance metrics across all branch locations.
home.telemetryDescription: Generated from cross-branch live signals and margin protection telemetry.
home.subscriptionRestricted: Some intelligence panels are unavailable for your current subscription/role.
home.strategicOverview: Strategic overview of financial performance, operational efficiency, and risk exposure across all locations.
home.ebitdaDescription: Calculated from revenue minus waste and surplus pressure
home.purchasingScoreDescription: Score factors in supplier anomalies and margin leakage patterns
home.dataWillAppear: Data will appear once operations begin
home.analyticsDescription: Generated from cross-branch operational signals, margin protection telemetry, and predictive analytics.

today.title: Today's Kitchen
today.description: Review your forecast, confirm production targets, and execute with precision.
today.insight: Each decision — accepted or overridden — sharpens the forecast. The system learns from every shift.

table.stockoutWarning: If you stock out by {quantity}, you could lose {margin} margin.
table.missingPricing: Pricing data is missing. Add selling price and cost to unlock revenue and waste estimates.
table.ifSoldOutWithMargin: If sold out: {revenue} revenue lost + {margin} margin lost

morning.lockFirst: Lock the plan first, then start service.
morning.nothingNotable: Nothing notable from other branches this morning.

alert.stockoutRisk: Stockout risk. Your current plan falls short of projected demand.
alert.wasteRisk: Waste exposure detected. Demand signal is weaker than your current prep.
alert.marginRisk: Margin variance. Deviation from forecast affects estimated contribution.
alert.stockoutRiskWithMargin: May run out — ~{cost} margin at risk
alert.wasteRiskWithCost: ~{cost} in waste if demand does not pick up

live.allClear: All clear — no urgent issues right now.
live.criticalFilterActive: Critical filter active — all items are within safe thresholds.
live.csvImportComplete: Sales data updated from CSV — live totals include the imported rows.
live.csvImportDescription: Import sales data from a POS export to keep your live monitor up to date.

closed.feelRightNow: How do you feel about today's service?
closed.whereYouDiverged: Where you diverged from the plan
closed.howEachItemDid: How each item did vs. forecast
closed.howItPlayed: Here is how today played out.
closed.cleanService: Clean service — no stockouts, no waste.
closed.solidSub: Close to the forecast. A few small adjustments could have saved more.
closed.greatSub: Smart overrides kept you ahead of demand.
closed.toughSub: Variance was higher than usual. The model will learn from this.
closed.goodSubStockouts: A few stockouts, but overall execution was solid.
closed.notePlaceholder: e.g. Short-staffed at lunch, ran out of salmon...

today.noActivePrepItems: No active prep items for this day.

confidenceNarrative.high: High confidence based on stable recent demand.
confidenceNarrative.moderate: Moderate confidence with some expected variance.
confidenceNarrative.low: Low confidence; demand is volatile or sparse.

agreementNarrative.notAvailable: Consensus not available for this forecast.
agreementNarrative.high: Models align closely on expected demand.
agreementNarrative.partial: Models partially agree; signals are mixed.
agreementNarrative.low: Models diverge; treat the forecast as less certain.

velocity.noPaceCheck: No live pace check yet. Tap update to compare today's sales pace to plan.
velocity.highDemand: Selling faster than plan by {deviation}%. Consider a quick batch cook to protect revenue.
velocity.lowDemand: Sales are {deviation}% below plan. Slow prep to reduce waste.
velocity.onTrack: Sales pace matches the plan. Keep the current prep rhythm.

feedback.accepted: Accepted suggestion. Plan aligned with forecast.

localEvent.label: Local event
localEvent.explanation: Local event and special activity effect.

error.acceptSuggestion: Could not accept suggestion. Try again.
error.keepPlan: Could not keep chef plan. Try again.

network.noAction: No high-confidence network action right now.
network.reduceExposure: Reduce {item} prep exposure for the next run and monitor sell-through before close.

override.foodAtRisk: ~{cost} food at risk if demand falls short
override.marginAtRisk: ~{cost} margin at risk if demand holds

modal.startServiceDescription: Lock the plan first, then start service.
modal.closeDayDescription: Are you sure you want to close this day?

csv.modalDescription: Upload a CSV file exported from your POS system to update today's sales data.
csv.noHeader: CSV file is missing a header row.
csv.unreadable: Unable to read this CSV file.
csv.downloadError: Unable to download template. Please try again.
csv.uploadDescription: Upload a CSV file from your POS
csv.templateDescription: Download a sample CSV template to see the expected format.

riskAlert.title: {type} RISK
riskAlert.detail: Risk of {outcome} is {severity} right now based on your current plan input.

driver.planVsSuggested: Your current plan is {planned} vs suggested {suggested}.
driver.stockoutBelow: At this plan, you are {qty} below baseline, increasing stockout exposure.
driver.stockoutPressure: Demand pressure is high for this item; consider a protective buffer.
driver.wasteAbove: At this plan, you are {qty} above baseline, increasing waste exposure.
driver.wasteSignal: Sell-through signal is weaker than usual for this item.
driver.marginShift: Current deviation can shift estimated margin by {amount}.

firedUp: That energy runs the whole team. Great shift.
This is the kind of day that builds momentum.
The kitchen felt it. Good work.
You showed up and it showed.
Days like this are what it is all for.
That was a real service. Well done.
good: Solid. Rest up, you earned it.
Not every day needs to be epic. This one worked.
A good day is a good day. Take that.
meh: Not every service hits. Tomorrow is fresh.
Steady counts too. You were there.
Some days just drift through. That is fine.
You ran the shift. That is what matters.
Even flat days teach the model something.
Not everything needs to be great. You showed up.
rough: Rough ones pass. You got through it.
Hard services are the ones that build you.
You showed up on a hard day. That is not nothing.
Some days push back. You kept going.
It was a tough shift. Rest now.

csvMap.title: Column Mapping
csvMap.heading: Heading
csvMap.description: Map your CSV columns to PrepIQ fields to import sales data.

itemDetail.description: Forecast signals, risk analysis, and history for this item.
itemDetail.insight: Your decisions on this item train the model for future shifts.

ingredients.description: Ingredients required to match your planned quantity.

init.title: Building today's plan

stage.targets: Setting prep targets with your waste-vs-stockout balance…

init.failedTitle: We couldn't finish building the plan

brief.llmBadge: Written by PrepIQ from audited pipeline numbers

provenance.title: How this plan was made
provenance.unavailable: Provenance details are not available for this plan yet.

read.title: Read your sales history
read.body: Every forecast starts from your own POS records — day by day, item by item.

clean.title: Set aside unusual days
clean.body: Closures, outages, sellouts and one-off spikes are detected and kept from distorting the forecast.

signals.title: Checked outside signals
signals.body: Weather, public holidays and nearby events are weighed against how your kitchen responded to them before.

blend.title: Blended forecasting models
blend.body: Several models forecast independently; the blend favors whichever has been most accurate here recently.

targets.title: Set prep targets
targets.body: Quantities balance the cost of running out against the cost of waste for each item.

taught.title: What this branch has taught us
taught.body: Not rules we set — patterns your branch proved over time, each measured from your own results.
taught.empty: No learned patterns yet. PrepIQ builds these as your branch racks up days.

pace.headline: By {time} you're at {actualPct} of today's plan — a typical day like this is at {expectedPct}.
pace.tooEarly: Pace tracking starts once the day's rhythm is established.
pace.itemSurge: Pacing {pct} vs typical — projected {projected} by close
pace.itemSlowdown: Pacing {pct} vs typical — projected {projected} by close

learned.rainResponse: Today was a rainy day — tomorrow's forecast now weighs how your kitchen responded to rain.
learned.eventResponse: A nearby event ran today — its real impact on your sales feeds the event model.
learned.overrides: {count} override(s) recorded; {won} beat the forecast — the model shifts its trust on those items.
learned.wasteRows: {count} waste event(s) feed tomorrow's buffer calculation.
learned.stockoutRows: {count} sellout(s) marked as censored demand — estimated from pace before selling out, not ignored.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.description: Manage your personal information, language preference, and account security.
profile.insight: Keeping your profile accurate helps your team identify and reach you quickly.

personalInfo.title: Personal Information

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language for the interface, API responses, and email notifications.
language.syncedNote: Synced to your account. Applies on all devices.

security.changePasswordDescription: Update your password. You will need your current password to make changes.
security.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters
security.accountStatusDescription: Your login credentials and verification state.

topNav.alertsDescription: Operational risks and AI insights will appear here in real-time.

organization.title: Organization Settings
organization.description: Manage global business identity and operational defaults.
organization.languageDescription: Interface language for this organization's workspace.

branch.title: Branch Settings
branch.description: Configure kitchen capacity, schedules, and local demand signals.
branch.noBranchSelected: Select a branch to configure its settings.
branch.demandContextBefore: Advanced demand patterns (nearby venues, events) are currently managed via the

delete.title: Delete this branch
delete.description: Removes this location from operations. Its history is retained, then purged after 90 days.
delete.lastBranch: You can't delete your only active branch. Add another branch first.
delete.confirm: Delete “{name}”? This removes it from operations. This cannot be undone from here.

shell.title: Settings
shell.description: Workspace configuration, access controls, and platform preferences.
shell.insight: Enable branch-level default context to reduce navigation friction for operators.

settings.underDevelopment: This section is currently under development.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect your POS and accounting systems to PrepIQ — per branch.
integrations.posIssueDescription: Sales data isn't syncing for this branch. Connect a POS system below.
integrations.privateBeta: QuickBooks, Xero, and OpenTable integrations are currently in private beta. Contact support to join the waitlist.

notifications.title: Notification Settings
notifications.description: Control how and when you receive operational alerts.

types.operationalDesc: System events: connectors, imports, invoices, backups
types.planningDesc: Pre-service alerts: forecasts, inventory checks, events
types.liveServiceDesc: In-service alerts: stockouts, demand spikes, production risk
types.learningDesc: End-of-day insights: forecast accuracy, waste trends
types.executiveDesc: Owner summaries: revenue trends, branch ranking, cost anomalies

notifications.digestRequiresEmail: Turn on Email for this type to receive it as a daily digest instead.
notifications.escalationDescription: Critical alerts (like connector outages or stockout risk) always keep an in-app record even if In-App is turned off for that type, so nothing business-critical goes unseen. Email and push preferences are still fully respected.

quietHours.title: Quiet Hours
quietHours.description: Silence push notifications during a set window each night. In-app notifications are never affected, so nothing is missed — you just won't be buzzed while it's on.

webPush.title: Get alerts in your browser
webPush.description: Turn on browser notifications to catch time-sensitive alerts even when this tab isn't open. We only push what needs a decision now, and you control which categories above.
webPush.denied: Notifications were blocked. You can allow them in your browser settings.
webPush.blocked: Notifications are blocked for this site — allow them in your browser settings to enable.
webPush.unconfigured: Browser push isn't configured on the server yet.
webPush.error: Couldn't enable browser notifications. Please try again.

roles.title: Custom Roles
roles.description: Create and manage custom roles with specific permissions.

empty.title: No custom roles yet.
empty.description: Create your first custom role to get started.

createModal.title: Create Custom Role
createModal.description: Define a new custom role and assign permissions.

editModal.title: Edit Custom Role
editModal.description: Update the custom role and its permissions.

deleteModal.title: Delete role "{name}"?
deleteModal.description: Deleting "{name}" cannot be undone. Members assigned to this role will need a new role.

users.title: Team Members
users.description: Manage team access and role assignments.

addMemberModal.title: Add Organization Member
addMemberModal.description: Invite a registered user. They'll receive the selected role.

removeModal.title: Remove {label}?
removeModal.description: This will remove {label} from the organization and revoke access immediately.
removeModal.descriptionDefault: This action will remove the member from the organization.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.subtitle: Irreversible actions. Please be certain before continuing.

soleOwner.title: You're the sole owner
soleOwner.body: Before deleting your account, transfer ownership or delete these organizations:

leave.title: Leave organization
leave.description: Remove yourself from this organization. Your work stays with the org; you keep your account.
leave.confirm: Are you sure you want to leave this organization? You'll lose access until re-invited.

transfer.title: Transfer ownership
transfer.description: Hand the owner role to another member. You'll be downgraded to admin.
transfer.modalDescription: Choose the member who will become the new owner.

org.title: Delete organization
org.description: Permanently deletes the organization, cancels billing, and removes every member's access.
org.modalDescription: This cancels your subscription and removes all branches and members.
org.warning: This is irreversible. All members lose access and billing is cancelled. Data is retained briefly, then purged.

account.title: Delete account
account.description: Permanently deletes your personal account and profile. This can't be undone.
account.modalDescription: Your profile is scheduled for deletion and anonymized after 30 days.

branch.title: Create your first branch
branch.description: Define your branch profile and operating schedule. You can update this later.
branch.scheduleDescription: Toggle open days and set hours for each day.
branch.limitReached: Branch limit reached on current plan.
branch.trialNoticeDescription: Creating this branch automatically activates a 30-day free trial of the Intelligence plan — full access, no card required. If you choose to subscribe to a paid plan, billing only starts after your trial ends.

branchPrompt.title: Let's set up your first branch.
branchPrompt.description: Every insight, every report, every shift runs through a branch. It takes two minutes.

sales.title: Connect Sales & POS
sales.description: Link your Point of Sale system to unlock real-time sales intelligence and margin tracking.
sales.question: How do you track sales?
sales.infoText: PrepIQ uses historical sales to generate production forecasts. The more data you provide, the more accurate your prep quantities will be.
sales.connectPosDesc: Pull 30–90 days of sales automatically. Items are created from your POS catalog.
sales.uploadCsvDesc: Export from your current system and upload. We'll map the columns for you.
sales.skipDesc: You can add data later, but forecasts will be unavailable until then.
sales.skipSubmit: Skip — show me the forecast anyway

staff.title: Invite your team
staff.description: Bring your team on board to start collaborating immediately.
staff.question: Does someone else handle your sales data?
staff.questionDesc: If a team member manages your POS or exports, they can connect it directly — no need to share credentials.
staff.yesOption: Yes — invite them to connect sales data
staff.yesDesc: They'll get access to connect the POS or upload CSV exports.
staff.noDesc: Invite your kitchen lead instead so they can log prep and waste from day one.
staff.inviteDataManagerDesc: They'll be able to connect your POS or upload sales exports directly.
staff.inviteKitchenLeadDesc: The forecast is ready. Invite the person who runs the kitchen so they can log production and track waste from day one.

pricing.title: Select your plan
pricing.description: Choose the right plan for your kitchen's needs.
pricing.heroDescription: Choose the plan that fits your kitchen operations. All plans include standard forecasting infrastructure.
pricing.secureInfraDesc: PropIQ uses enterprise-grade encryption for all POS integrations and operational data. Verified PCI-DSS compliant transactions.
pricing.uptimeDesc: Our forecasting models run on dedicated HA clusters to ensure your kitchen is never without intelligence, even during peak loads.
pricing.prioritySupportDesc: Intelligence and Command tiers receive priority access to our kitchen operations analysts to optimize your deployment.

checkout.title: Complete your setup
checkout.description: Enter your payment details to activate your workspace.
checkout.transitioning: Transitioning your {branch} branch to the {plan} plan.
checkout.trialDeferralSubtitle: Locking in {plan} — your free trial keeps running.
checkout.trialDeferralDesc: You're currently on a free trial. Your card is charged today to lock in this plan, but your trial isn't cut short — you keep full access, and this plan's billing period only begins once your trial ends.
checkout.trialDeferralDescWithDate: You're currently on a free trial. Your card is charged today to lock in this plan, but your trial isn't cut short — you keep full access until {date}, when this plan's billing period begins.
checkout.upgradeTransitionDesc: You are currently on the {currentPlan} plan. By proceeding, your new {newPlan} tier will activate immediately, replacing your existing subscription window for this branch.
checkout.termsPrivacy: By proceeding, you agree to PrepIQ's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. Payments are non-refundable.
checkout.shieldDesc: Your data is encrypted and processed in isolated VPCs. Subscription management is handled via authorized payment providers only.
checkout.noPlanSelected: No plan selected. Go back and select a plan.
checkout.noLocationSelected: No location selected. Go back and select a location.
checkout.fieldsRequired: Business name, billing email, and phone number are all required.
checkout.checkoutFailed: Checkout failed — please try again or contact support.
checkout.cardNotStored: Your card is never stored on our servers. All payments are processed via a PCI-compliant gateway.
checkout.cardAccepted: Visa, Mastercard, and all major cards accepted
checkout.securePayment: Secure, encrypted payment — you will be redirected to complete payment.

forecast.title: Forecast & Demand
forecast.description: Set up your initial demand signals to power the AI.
forecast.loadingTitle: PrepIQ is learning your kitchen patterns...
forecast.loadingDesc: Building a 3-week forecast from your imported sales.
forecast.errorTitle: We couldn't generate setup insights yet.
forecast.errorDesc: Connect a POS or upload CSV sales data, then retry.
forecast.insightDesc: This is generated from your uploaded sales records and item behavior over the last {days} days.
forecast.noItemData: No item-level data yet. Import more sales rows to unlock performance ranking.
forecast.footerDesc: Next: invite your kitchen staff, or skip to your dashboard.

items.noMenuImported: No menu items have been imported yet. Connect a POS or upload a CSV to populate items.

purchasing.title: Purchasing
purchasing.description: Track suppliers, item costs, and order efficiency.
purchasing.insight: Monitor supplier performance and cost trends to protect your margins.
purchasing.mainDescription: Track supplier spend, detect cost anomalies, and identify ordering inefficiencies across your locations.
purchasing.readOnlyBanner: You have read-only access to purchasing data. Contact your organization admin to make changes.
purchasing.supplierSectionDesc: Total spend and cost changes per supplier over the current period.
purchasing.trendsSectionDesc: Unit cost movements and volatility signals for key ingredients.
purchasing.varianceSectionDesc: Compare expected vs actual costs and flag potential overpayments or duplicate invoices.
purchasing.efficiencySectionDesc: Identify over-ordering, emergency purchases, and stockout-driven buying by branch.
purchasing.compareSectionDesc: Select two suppliers to compare their total spend side by side.
